creator: bde@zeta.org.au
text:
>>Description:
>
>	Instead of
>
>		who [am I] [file]
>
>	it should look like
>
>		who [am I]
>		who [file]

Also, the options parsing is feeble:

	$ who -z
	who: -z: No such file or directory
	$ who am you
	bde ...
	$ who 1 2 3
	usage: who [file]
	       who am I

This usage message different from (and better) than the one given by
the fixed man page.

Bruce
